behavior_summary: Implements the NPC Aramina's local gameplay behavior: how she is described when examined, how she picks and runs one of several 'schedules' (patrol/dialog routines), how she reacts to the avatar entering/leaving her fast-area trigger, theft events, and being targeted by spells.
ARAMINA::look presents a short descriptive 'bark' depending on whether Aramina is dead and on two configuration globals (araminaName and araminaJob).

A schedule subsystem chooses a numeric araminaSchedule (written by ARAMINA::schedule) and enter/leave triggers spawn specific schedule runners (examples: U8P_ARAMINA::0460 for schedule 1 and other hex-named routines for others).

Reactive behaviors: AvatarStoleSomething makes Aramina orient/move toward stolen items and bark a warning; cast may call guards or shout for help with some randomness; leaveFastArea cleans up refs and, if Aramina is alive, teleports her to random coordinates.
notable_control_flow: Entry point for player-visible behavior is U8P_ARAMINA::look which first checks Npc::isDead(pid) and branches to corpse vs alive text.

Schedule selection: U8P_ARAMINA::schedule reads devonInRule and spawns helper routines that eventually write the global araminaSchedule; enter fast-area handler reads that global and spawns the corresponding schedule runner.
Many actions are implemented by spawning other methods (spawn) rather than blocking: movement, guard-calls (CALGUARD::0080), and schedule runners are all spawned.
leaveFastArea performs cleanup (resetRef calls) then conditionally teleports the NPC using urandom-generated coordinates — dead NPCs are not teleported.

Reactive loop/timing in cast and schedule runners uses engine utility routines (FREE::1C19, FREE::1D62, FREE::2A56) for pacing/pauses; speech is gated by the global somebodyTalking in schedule runners.
open_questions: Precise behaviors of the schedule routines named only by hex (e.g., U8P_ARAMINA::0CEC, U8P_ARAMINA::0BBB) are inferred but their full role and timings are not shown in the extracted text.
Exact semantics of FREE::1C19 / FREE::1D62 / FREE::2A56 (timing vs resource cleanup) — they appear to be pacing or utility calls but that is not certain.
Whether araminaName/araminaJob are boolean toggles or multi-value enums (the logic suggests boolean-like selection but full range is unknown).
Whether teleport coordinates chosen by leaveFastArea can put Aramina into invalid or off-map locations depending on urandom ranges (map-clamping details handled by Npc::teleport are not visible).

main_function.name: U8P_ARAMINA::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the textual description emitted when a process (usually the player) examines Aramina. Chooses an appropriate short-description bark based on Aramina's alive/dead state and two configuration globals (araminaName, araminaJob).
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player/process performs the 'U8P_ARAMINA::look' (examine) action on Aramina (process pid passed in).

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::look
function_map.role: Handle 'U8P_ARAMINA::look' examine event for Aramina; emit corpse vs alive description using Item::bark.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::schedule
function_map.role: Decide and set the global araminaSchedule (reads devonInRule), spawn helper schedule-calculation and a schedule startup routine.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered when avatar enters Aramina's fast-area trigger; resets references and spawns the active schedule runner based on araminaSchedule.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered on exit of the fast-area; clears refs and teleports the NPC to random coordinates if alive.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: React to theft by resetting refs, orienting/moving toward the stolen item, barking a warning, and spawning reactive schedule behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::cast
function_map.role: Handle being targeted by spells: checks target, spawns guard-calling behavior, and may vocalize calls for help with probabilistic branching.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::0460
function_map.role: Schedule runner (schedule 1): iterates positions/frames, pathfinds and spawns movement/talk actions; respects somebodyTalking to avoid interrupting others.

function_map.name: U8P_ARAMINA::059D
function_map.role: Dialog/greeting handler used by schedules; chooses barks based on araminaMet and other parameters and may cause movement/animation spawns.

internal_calls.purpose: Spawn a schedule-runner method when schedule selection decides on schedule 1 (spawned indirectly via schedule-selection helpers).
Spawn the schedule runner corresponding to araminaSchedule == 1 when avatar enters the fast area.
Spawn alternate schedule runner when araminaSchedule == 2 (callee named by hex id in extracted code).
Spawn alternate schedule runner when araminaSchedule == 3 (callee named by hex id in extracted code).
Spawn enter-fast-area behavior after responding to theft to switch Aramina into a reactive schedule/state.
Likely spawned/used by schedule runners to handle local dialog/greeting branches during movement loops (inferred usage).

external_calls.purpose: Check whether Aramina is dead to choose corpse vs alive description.
Emit the selected short description string to the viewer/process.
Clear stored reference fields for Aramina (IDs like 0205, 0204, 00F0, 0200) when avatar enters area.
Clear stored references on area exit.
Teleport Aramina to random coordinates (uses urandom) when avatar leaves fast area and Aramina is alive.
Compute direction from Aramina to the stolen item so Aramina can orient/move toward it.
Spawn a movement/animation method to move/orient Aramina toward the stolen item.
Determine who the incoming spell targeted (to check if the avatar or NPC is targeted).
Call guards or summon help when Aramina is targeted by a hostile spell (spawned helper).
Randomize whether Aramina shouts for help and which phrase she uses.
Request pathfinding to chosen coordinates as part of patrol/movement schedule.
Read map tile/frame data to decide movement or behavior in the schedule loop.
Read map tile/shape data to influence schedule decisions (walkable/occupied checks inferred).
Get Aramina's facing direction before spawning directional movement/animation methods.
Utility/timing call used inside a loop while handling spell targeting (likely pacing).

reads.name: araminaName (global [0204])
reads.likely_effect: Selects which name-string variant is used in ARAMINA::look and possibly other dialog (e.g., toggles full name vs short).

reads.name: araminaJob (global [0205])
reads.likely_effect: Controls whether to include a job/title word in Aramina's description (e.g., 'servant' vs 'girl') used by ARAMINA::look and dialog.

reads.name: araminaSchedule (global [0207])
reads.likely_effect: Determines which schedule runner is spawned when the avatar enters Aramina's fast area; written by U8P_ARAMINA::schedule and read by enter/steal handlers.

reads.name: araminaMet (global [0203])
reads.likely_effect: Tracks whether the player has met Aramina; affects greeting/dialog choices in schedule/dialog helpers like U8P_ARAMINA::059D.

reads.name: devonInRule (global [0058])
reads.likely_effect: Alters schedule selection logic inside U8P_ARAMINA::schedule (world-rule dependent branching).

reads.name: somebodyTalking (global [000F])
reads.likely_effect: Gates speaking behavior inside schedule runner U8P_ARAMINA::0460 to avoid overlapping speech with other NPCs/processes.

writes.name: araminaSchedule (global [0207])
writes.likely_effect: Set by U8P_ARAMINA::schedule to choose which behavior/patrol/dialog schedule will run when area events occur.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Implements the NPC Aramina's local gameplay behavior: how she is described when examined, how she picks and runs one of several 'schedules' (patrol/dialog routines), how she reacts to the avatar entering/leaving her fast-area trigger, theft events, and being targeted by spells.
